Subject: Franky Sulistio
Message:
Franky Sulistio will shortly be joining the Gas Fundamentals IT group. Franky was previously working on the Entelligence Project. His initial role will cover the following areas:

Floor support, 6.45am onwards ... . (Plasmas, 34th Floor Model, general floor software support)
Responsible for the re-architecture/developement of all plasma based EOL models.
Responsible for the re-architecture/developement of all plasma based Market Data models.
Support for Gas Fundamentals Systems, ie Jaguar Reporting and Jaguar Harvesting.
